◎简　　介  

　　When a large Iranian-American family gathers for the patriarch's heart transplant, a family secret is uncovered that catapults the estranged mother and daughter into an exploration of the past. Toggling between the United States and Iran over decades, mother and daughter discover they are more alike than they know.源自：https://festival.sundance.org/program/film/638a207277dd3d85c...
